entry.title: Rise | Ghost of Sparta | Kratos | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

RISE

This is more than just a poster.
It’s a reminder.

Set against a powerful sunset horizon, this cinematic warrior silhouette captures the moment between boyhood and strength — between doubt and destiny.

“This is no place for a boy. You must be a warrior.”

Perfect for those who believe in growth, discipline, and rising above challenges. Whether you're building your mindset, your career, or your body — this artwork symbolizes transformation.

Minimal. Powerful. Relatable.

Ideal for:
• Bedroom walls
• Gym spaces
• Study rooms
• Gaming setups
• Motivational corners

Printed on premium high-quality paper with sharp detailing and rich cinematic tones.

Rise above. Every single day.

entry.title: OPTIMUS PRIME | Transformers | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

Bring bold mech-warrior energy to your workspace or gaming setup with this Optimus Prime 3 Piece Set, featuring a powerful armored hero stance with cinematic lighting, metallic detailing, and street/graffiti-style typography accents that give it a modern “battle-ready” vibe. The colors pop beautifully on minimalist walls and looks especially clean above a desk, monitor, or entertainment unit.

Best for: gaming rooms, bedroom setups, studio walls, man caves, and gift ideas for Transformers/mecha lovers.

Style: sci-fi/mecha illustration + cinematic lighting feel + street/graffiti typography
Look: wide panorama that feels like one big artwork once aligned

entry.title: SpiderMan Trio | Spider Verse | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

Bring high-energy comic vibes to your workspace or gaming setup with this SpiderMan Trio  Spider Verse  3 Piece Set featuring a dynamic masked web-hero trio over bold “ROCK OUT” typography and graffiti accents. The colors pop beautifully on minimalist walls and looks especially clean above a desk, monitor, or entertainment unit.

Best for: gaming rooms, bedroom setups, studio walls, man caves, and gift ideas for comic lovers.
Style: comic illustration + cinematic lighting feel + street/graffiti typography
Look: wide panorama that feels like one big artwork once aligned

entry.title: THE GHOST | Samurai | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

Bring a bold, cinematic Japanese samurai aesthetic to your setup with this THE GHOST 3-Panel Split Wall Set. Featuring a lone warrior in a stormy, fog-filled landscape with striking red calligraphy, this artwork gives your wall a clean minimal + powerful vibe that looks insane above a desk or gaming station.

The split layout creates a premium “gallery wall” feel with dramatic negative space and a strong center focus—perfect for gaming rooms, bedrooms, studios, offices, and anime/Japan-inspired decor lovers.

What you’ll receive

  • 1 Set = 3 Panels (split design)

  • High-detail print with sharp contrast + minimalist ink style

  • Ideal for wide walls above a desk/setup

Size options (final trimmed size)

We print on full sheets with white borders, then manually trim for a clean finish—so the sizes below are the final set size after trimming:

  • A4 Sheet Set: 24.5 × 11.5 in

  • A3 Sheet Set: 34.5 × 16.5 in

  • 13×19 Sheet Set: 37.5 × 18.5 in

Note: Manual trimming may cause a slight size variation (±0.5 in).

Installation note: Frames / wall tapes are not included. You can add our wall-stick option at checkout.

entry.title: King Steve Harrington | Stranger Things #00 | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

Celebrate the unbeatable charm and fearless attitude of King Steve with this stunning, high-detail concept poster inspired by his iconic heroic moments.
This artwork captures Steve in full battle-ready mode leather jacket, nail-studded bat, and that signature confident stare that made him a fan-favorite protector of Hawkins.

Set against a dramatic red-and-blue Upside Down–inspired background, the poster blends graphic-novel energy, cinematic lighting, and bold typography to create a powerful statement piece for any Stranger Things fan.

Every detail, from the stylized shadows to the glowing red atmosphere, reflects the intensity of the world Steve fights to protect reminding everyone why he is more than just “King Steve”… he is the heart of the team.

Ideal for bedrooms, gaming rooms, studios, and collectors, this poster turns your space into a gateway to the Upside Down.

entry.title: Grand Meth Empire | Breaking Bad Concept Art #01 | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

Premium high-definition wall poster of Grand Meth Empire | Breaking Bad #01 | 3 Piece Set, designed to instantly upgrade the aesthetic of your room.

Printed on ultra-thick 300 GSM matte photo paper for rich colours, sharp detailing and a soft anti-glare finish. Long-lasting, fade-resistant and crafted to give your wall a clean, premium look with zero effort.

This poster blends perfectly into bedroom, living room, gaming setup or workspace décor. Easy to frame, perfect for collage walls, and ideal for anyone who loves aesthetic room vibes, minimal design and high-quality prints.

A great pick for personal use or gifting — made to match your vibe and elevate your space.

entry.title: Arcane Jinx | Graffiti Split | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

Bring pure chaotic energy to your room with this explosive Arcane Jinx graffiti-style split panel poster.
Featuring Jinx in full punk-rock mode with her iconic long braids, neon cyan–purple highlights, and a weaponized guitar, this artwork captures her wild, unpredictable spirit straight from the streets of Zaun.

The bold graffiti tags, distressed textures, and high-contrast color palette make the piece feel raw, rebellious, and alive — exactly how Jinx would leave her mark. The 3-piece split design adds a dramatic, modern display effect perfect for gaming setups, bedrooms, studios, and collectors who want powerful visual impact.

Printed in high-resolution on premium fade-resistant material, this poster set is a must-have for lovers of Arcane, League of Legends, punk aesthetics, and edgy wall decor.

entry.title: Jinx Enemy | Arcane | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

Bring the chaos, attitude, and raw energy of Jinx into your space with this striking Arcane-inspired “ENEMY” poster. Designed with a bold neon-red palette, grunge textures, and an atmospheric moonlit backdrop, this artwork captures Jinx’s rebellious spirit and her iconic duality — the hero they loved, the enemy they created.

Jinx sits front and center on her throne-like structure, staring down with a mix of defiance and vulnerability, perfectly matching the tone of the hit Arcane soundtrack “Enemy.” The massive ENEMY typography behind her adds weight and intensity, while the glitched lyrics on the corner tie the entire visual together with emotional depth.

Printed in razor-sharp quality with vivid colors, this poster is the perfect addition to bedrooms, gaming rooms, studios, or any setup that celebrates Arcane, League of Legends, or high-stylized character art.

entry.title: The Upside Down Awakens | Stranger Things #01 | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

Step into the dark world of the Upside Down with this electrifying Stranger Things concept poster, featuring powerful fantasy-style artwork inspired by the show’s iconic Season 4 villain — Vecna.
Surrounded by glowing red lightning and floating D20 dice, the poster fuses the essence of Dungeons & Dragons with the sinister atmosphere of Hawkins’ most terrifying threat.

At the forefront stands a heroic party — an archer, a warrior, a bard, and a fire-wielding mage — symbolizing the fearless energy of the show’s beloved characters as they face off against supernatural evil.
The intense red palette, dynamic poses, and cinematic lighting make this piece a perfect centerpiece for any Stranger Things fan.

Ideal for bedrooms, gaming rooms, studios, and collectors, this poster turns your space into a gateway to the Upside Down.
